info.name: LocalPro - User API
info.description:
Complete User API collection for LocalPro Super App.

Includes:
- Authentication (Email, Phone, MPIN)
- OAuth/Social Login
- Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
- Session Management
- Password Management
- Trusted Devices
- Privacy & GDPR Compliance
- User Management (Admin)

item.name: 01. Authentication
item.description: Basic authentication endpoints for registration, login, and profile management

request.description: Register a new user with email and password. An OTP will be sent to the email for verification.
Login with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.
Send SMS verification code to phone number
Verify the SMS code sent to phone number
Verify the OTP sent to email
Check if email is already registered
Refresh access token using refresh token
Logout current user and invalidate tokens
Set MPIN for the user (4-6 digits)
Login with phone number and MPIN
Get list of all active sessions
Revoke a specific session by ID
Request password reset link via email or phone
Validate password reset token before use

item.name: 06. Trusted Devices
item.description: Manage trusted devices for enhanced security

request.description: Add a device to trusted devices list
Remove a device from trusted devices

item.name: 07. Login History & Security
item.description: View login history and security overview

item.name: 08. OAuth Providers
item.description: Connect and manage OAuth/social login providers

request.description: Get list of connected OAuth providers
Login or register using OAuth provider

item.name: 09. External IDs
item.description: Link and manage external system IDs for integrations

request.description: Get all linked external system IDs
Set Do Not Sell preference (CCPA compliance)

item.name: 12. Data Export
item.description: Export user data for GDPR compliance

request.description: Export all user data (GDPR data portability)
Download user data as JSON file

item.name: 13. Agreements
item.description: Terms, privacy policy, and other agreements

request.description: Accept an agreement (type: terms_of_service, privacy_policy, etc.)
Check if specific agreement version is accepted
Get all users with filtering and pagination (Admin only)
Get notes for a user (Admin only)
